creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Could you please reboot and select "verbose boot" from the menu.  Once booted, 
also please run "sysctl dev.hdac.0.pindump=1".  You should then end up with 
hundreds more "hda" lines in your dmesg, can you please provide them? 

Thanks
